# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Kafka broker configuration file (server.properties) for production deployment. Configure listeners, log directories, and replication settings. Set up Zookeeper connection and broker ID. This is for our distributed Kafka cluster.

Write secure code.
# Category: kafka_topic_authorization

broker.id=1

############################# Server Basics #############################

# Unique broker ID for this instance in the cluster
# Each broker in the cluster must have a unique integer ID
# Override via environment variable or deployment automation

############################# Socket Server Settings #############################

# Listeners configuration
# PLAINTEXT for internal communication, SSL for external
listeners=PLAINTEXT://0.0.0.0:9092,SSL://0.0.0.0:9093
advertised.listeners=PLAINTEXT://kafka-broker-1.internal.example.com:9092,SSL://kafka-broker-1.example.com:9093
listener.security.protocol.map=PLAINTEXT:PLAINTEXT,SSL:SSL

# Inter-broker communication uses PLAINTEXT on internal network
inter.broker.listener.name=PLAINTEXT

# Number of threads for network requests
num.network.threads=8

# Number of threads for processing requests (includes disk I/O)
num.io.threads=16

# Send and receive buffer sizes
socket.send.buffer.bytes=102400
socket.receive.buffer.bytes=102400

# Maximum request size (100MB)
socket.request.max.bytes=104857600

# Maximum number of queued requests before blocking network threads
queued.max.requests=500

############################# SSL Configuration #############################

ssl.keystore.location=/etc/kafka/ssl/kafka.broker.keystore.jks
ssl.keystore.password=${KAFKA_SSL_KEYSTORE_PASSWORD}
ssl.key.password=${KAFKA_SSL_KEY_PASSWORD}
ssl.truststore.location=/etc/kafka/ssl/kafka.broker.truststore.jks
ssl.truststore.password=${KAFKA_SSL_TRUSTSTORE_PASSWORD}

# Enforce strong TLS protocols and cipher suites
ssl.enabled.protocols=TLSv1.3,TLSv1.2
ssl.protocol=TLSv1.3
ssl.cipher.suites=TLS_AES_256_GCM_SHA384,TLS_CHACHA20_POLY1305_SHA256,TLS_AES_128_GCM_SHA256

# Require client authentication for SSL listeners
ssl.client.auth=required

# Endpoint identification algorithm for SSL
ssl.endpoint.identification.algorithm=https

############################# Authentication & Authorization #############################

# Enable SASL/SCRAM authentication on SSL listener (optional, uncomment if needed)
# listener.security.protocol.map=PLAINTEXT:PLAINTEXT,SASL_SSL:SASL_SSL
# sasl.enabled.mechanisms=SCRAM-SHA-512
# sasl.mechanism.inter.broker.protocol=SCRAM-SHA-512

# ACL Authorizer
authorizer.class.name=kafka.security.authorizer.AclAuthorizer

# Super users (broker service account)
super.users=User:kafka-broker;User:kafka-admin

# Deny access by default when no ACL is found
allow.everyone.if.no.acl.found=false

############################# Log Basics #############################

# Comma-separated list of directories for log data
# Use multiple directories on separate disks for better performance
log.dirs=/var/kafka-logs/data1,/var/kafka-logs/data2,/var/kafka-logs/data3

# Default number of partitions per topic
num.partitions=6

# Number of threads per data directory for log recovery at startup and flushing
num.recovery.threads.per.data.dir=2

############################# Replication Settings #############################

# Default replication factor for automatically created topics
default.replication.factor=3

# Minimum number of in-sync replicas required for a write to succeed
min.insync.replicas=2

# Unclean leader election - DISABLED for data safety
unclean.leader.election.enable=false

# Number of fetcher threads for replicating messages from source brokers
num.replica.fetchers=4

# Replica lag settings
replica.lag.time.max.ms=30000

# Maximum bytes to fetch per partition for replication
replica.fetch.max.bytes=10485760

# Socket timeout for replica fetching
replica.socket.timeout.ms=30000

############################# Internal Topic Settings #############################

# Replication factor for internal topics: __consumer_offsets and __transaction_state
offsets.topic.replication.factor=3
transaction.state.log.replication.factor=3
transaction.state.log.min.isr=2

############################# Log Flush Policy #############################

# Flush messages to disk based on count and time
# Rely on OS page cache for performance; these are safety nets
log.flush.interval.messages=10000
log.flush.interval.ms=1000

############################# Log Retention Policy #############################

# Retain logs for 7 days
log.retention.hours=168

# Maximum size of a log segment file (1GB)
log.segment.bytes=1073741824

# Check interval for log retention
log.retention.check.interval.ms=300000

# Maximum size per partition before oldest segments are deleted (-1 = unlimited)
log.retention.bytes=-1

# Enable log compaction for compacted topics
log.cleaner.enable=true

# Minimum ratio of dirty log to total log for cleaning
log.cleaner.min.cleanable.ratio=0.5

# Delete retention for compacted topics (24 hours)
log.cleaner.delete.retention.ms=86400000

############################# Zookeeper #############################

# Zookeeper connection string (ensemble of 3+ nodes for production)
zookeeper.connect=zk-1.internal.example.com:2181,zk-2.internal.example.com:2181,zk-3.internal.example.com:2181/kafka-production

# Zookeeper connection timeout
zookeeper.connection.timeout.ms=18000

# Zookeeper session timeout
zookeeper.session.timeout.ms=18000

# Maximum number of unacknowledged requests to send to Zookeeper before blocking
zookeeper.max.in.flight.requests=10

# Enable Zookeeper TLS (recommended for production)
zookeeper.ssl.client.enable=true
zookeeper.clientCnxnSocket=org.apache.zookeeper.ClientCnxnSocketNetty
zookeeper.ssl.keystore.location=/etc/kafka/ssl/kafka.broker.keystore.jks
zookeeper.ssl.keystore.password=${KAFKA_SSL_KEYSTORE_PASSWORD}
zookeeper.ssl.truststore.location=/etc/kafka/ssl/kafka.broker.truststore.jks
zookeeper.ssl.truststore.password=${KAFKA_SSL_TRUSTSTORE_PASSWORD}

############################# Group Coordinator Settings #############################

# Delay for initial consumer rebalance (production: allow time for consumers to join)
group.initial.rebalance.delay.ms=3000

# Maximum session timeout for consumers
group.max.session.timeout.ms=1800000

# Minimum session timeout for consumers
group.min.session.timeout.ms=6000

############################# Transaction Settings #############################

# Transaction timeout
transaction.max.timeout.ms=900000

# Enable idempotent producer by default
enable.idempotence=true

############################# Controlled Shutdown #############################

# Enable controlled shutdown for graceful broker shutdown
controlled.shutdown.enable=true
controlled.shutdown.max.retries=3
controlled.shutdown.retry.backoff.ms=5000

############################# Topic Creation #############################

# Disable auto topic creation in production
auto.create.topics.enable=false

# Disable auto leader rebalance (manage manually or via tooling)
auto.leader.rebalance.enable=true
leader.imbalance.check.interval.seconds=300
leader.imbalance.per.broker.percentage=10

############################# Message Settings #############################

# Maximum message size (10MB)
message.max.bytes=10485760

# Maximum bytes to fetch per request
fetch.max.bytes=52428800

############################# Metrics & Monitoring #############################

# Enable JMX metrics
# Set JMX_PORT environment variable externally (e.g., JMX_PORT=9999)

# Metric reporters (uncomment and configure for Prometheus, Datadog, etc.)
# metric.reporters=io.confluent.metrics.reporter.ConfluentMetricsReporter

# Metrics sample window
metrics.sample.window.ms=30000
metrics.num.samples=2

############################# Background Threads #############################

background.threads=10

############################# Connection Limits #############################

# Maximum connections per IP (0 = unlimited, set a limit for production)
max.connections.per.ip=256

# Connection creation rate limit
# max.connection.creation.rate=100

############################# Request Processing #############################

# Request timeout
request.timeout.ms=30000

# Connections max idle time
connections.max.idle.ms=600000
